### Observer


```typescript
export interface Observer<T> 
```

<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  属性 | 描述 | 类型 | 默认值 |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  complete | 输出完毕的事件回调 | () =&gt; void | - |
|  next | 向外输出最新数据的回调 | (value: T) =&gt; void | - |
